summary: Tested all 3 new features: (1) Remember-me checkbox - PASS, (2) Email verification with Resend - mostly PASS with 1 critical bug, (3) Streak confetti code review - PASS (hard to auto-test, code reviewed). Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: login/signup UI all correct, 1 critical integration bug found in login response.

minor.issue: Response does NOT include `emailVerified` field. Bug impact: `VerifyEmailBanner` (main.jsx:178) condition `currentUser.emailVerified === false` is always `false` for returning users (undefined !== false), so the banner NEVER shows after re-login. Only works during the initial registration session.
`resend` package (v2.26.0) is installed but NOT in /app/backend/requirements.txt. Could cause deployment failures on fresh installs.

integration_issues.flow: Email verification banner for returning users
integration_issues.issue: VerifyEmailBanner (bottom yellow bar) never shows for users who log in after their initial registration session. Root cause: login endpoint doesn't return emailVerified field → currentUser.emailVerified is undefined (not false) → banner condition fails. Fix: add emailVerified to login response in server.py.

integration_issues.flow: Signup with email → verification success screen
integration_issues.issue: Verification success screen ('Verifique seu e-mail') only shows when emailSent=true. In Resend test mode, only owner email (rafah.26ferreira@hotmail.com) receives emails, so emailSent=false for all other emails, and verification screen is never shown. Users are silently logged in instead. In production (Resend not in test mode) this would work correctly.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix /api/auth/login and /api/auth/login-email to include emailVerified field in response. In server.py lines ~479-490 and ~535+, add: 'emailVerified': user.get('email_verified') to the user dict
Optional: Change verification success screen trigger from `emailSent` to `email provided` - so users always see the verification prompt even if email delivery failed temporarily
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 479-490 (login response) and ~535 (login-email response): Both login endpoints are missing `emailVerified: user.get('email_verified')` in the returned user object. This breaks the VerifyEmailBanner display for returning users who log back in.
requirements.txt: `resend` package is missing - should add `resend>=2.0.0` for production deployments

LoginScreen.jsx line 40-43: Verification success screen shown only when emailSent=true. Better UX would be to show it whenever email is provided, not just when send succeeds - users who provide email should always be told about verification regardless of delivery status

useHabits.js lines 53-107: Streak confetti implementation looks correct - properly detects milestones [7,14,21,30,60,90,100,200,365], dispatches SET_CONFETTI and ADD_TOAST. Cannot auto-test without 7+ day data.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (remember-me, signup flows, verifyEmailPage all working; banner broken for returning users)

seed_data_creation: Created ~8 test users via backend tests (usernames: emvf{RUN_ID}*, noeml{RUN_ID}* etc.) and 2 via frontend signup tests. Restarted backend twice to reset rate limiter.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email verification features are mostly implemented. The critical fix needed is: add `emailVerified: user.get('email_verified')` to the login response in both login endpoints (lines ~479-490 and ~535+ in server.py). After fix, test that VerifyEmailBanner appears when logging in as testuser2 (rafah.26ferreira@hotmail.com, email not yet verified). The verification success screen (after signup with email) can only be fully tested with the owner email rafah.26ferreira@hotmail.com in Resend test mode. Streak confetti in useHabits.js was code-reviewed and looks correctly implemented - it triggers at milestones [7,14,21,30,60,90,100,200,365] days. The VerifyEmailPage (invalid token) renders correctly showing error state. Remember-me feature: checked=localStorage, unchecked=sessionStorage - both working correctly.

email_verified_missing_in_login.bug: VerifyEmailBanner never shows for returning users
email_verified_missing_in_login.root_cause: Login endpoint (POST /api/auth/login, lines 479-490) builds the user response dict without including `email_verified` field from MongoDB. The register endpoint (lines 768-778) correctly includes `emailVerified`, but login does not.
email_verified_missing_in_login.reproduction: 1) Register as testuser2 with email. 2) Clear browser storage (localStorage.clear()). 3) Log back in as testuser2. 4) The yellow 'Confirme seu e-mail' banner does NOT appear, even though email is unverified.
email_verified_missing_in_login.fix: In server.py, add to login response: 'emailVerified': user.get('email_verified') in both /api/auth/login (line ~488) and /api/auth/login-email (~line 540)
